attributes.style: width: 920px; min-height: 1100px; background: rgb(255, 255, 255); font-family: Inter, sans-serif; color: rgb(31, 30, 28);
background: rgb(255, 255, 255); border-bottom: 1px solid rgb(234, 231, 224); position: sticky; top: 0px; z-index: 50;
max-width: 920px; margin: 0px auto; padding: 0px 32px; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; height: 60px;

background: none; border-width: medium; border-style: none; border-color: currentcolor; border-image: initial; cursor: pointer; padding: 0px; font-family: Fraunces, serif; font-size: 24px; font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: -0.025em; color: rgb(31, 30, 28);
display: flex; gap: 2px;

background: none; border-width: medium; border-style: none; border-color: currentcolor; border-image: initial; cursor: pointer; font-family: inherit; padding: 6px 14px; font-size: 13px; font-weight: 400; border-radius: 6px; color: rgb(142, 136, 126);

background: rgb(243, 241, 236); border-width: medium; border-style: none; border-color: currentcolor; border-image: initial; cursor: pointer; font-family: inherit; padding: 6px 14px; font-size: 13px; font-weight: 600; border-radius: 6px; color: rgb(31, 30, 28);

background: none; border-width: medium; border-style: none; border-color: currentcolor; border-image: initial; cursor: pointer; font-family: inherit; padding: 6px 14px; font-size: 13px; font-weight: 400; border-radius: 6px; color: rgb(142, 136, 126);
